/usr/bin/ar qc libsparse_tensor_core.a CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/src/ast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/src/codegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/src/codegen/output_assembly_emitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/src/codegen/output_assembly_shared.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/src/codegen/program_emitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/src/codegen/reference_emitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/src/codegen/runtime_emitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/src/ir.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/src/optimizations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/src/scheduled_optimizations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/src/semantic_ir.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sparse_tensor_core.dir/parser.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsparse_tensor_core.a
